creator: nsayer@quack.kfu.com
text:
Splitting out the c-client library broke the pine4+ssl port. That's
ok, though, since adding ssl support to the cclient port would allow
all of its users to use the ssl support.

The only interesting gotcha is that after this patch all cclient users
must be compiled with -lssl -lcrypto _unless_ ADDSSL=no was done at
the time cclient was built. I am not sure quite what to do about that.

Fix: Apply this patch, then make makesum.
